headline: Customers Report Problems With Charles Schwab Platforms
summary: Users are reporting some issues with Charles Schwab’s digital platforms on Wednesday afternoon. Upon opening the Schwab mobile app, one message informed users that “Certain functionality on Schwab.com and our mobile app may intermittently be slow or unavailable.

headline: Jefferies Stock Gains as Takeover Speculation Builds on Lower Valuation
summary: JEF gains as takeover talk heats up, with SMFG eyeing a potential bid amid the firm's lower valuation and ongoing strategic partnership.

headline: Robinhood's New Share Repurchase Plan: A Sustainable Catalyst?
summary: HOOD's new $1.5B buyback highlights balance sheet strength, but its long-term impact hinges on steady growth in subscriptions, interest income and products.
